case_title: DAVID YOKE YUEN VS. CYNTHIA LYLEAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, DAVID YOKE AS TO DEFENDANT LYLEAN, CYNTHIA AKA FAY, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CRYSTAL READER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
